summary: Executed Phase 3 of the V0.8 Docs Refactoring. Successfully used a robust scaffolding script (generate_phase3_docs.py) to generate the GitBook-style hierarchical markdown files, adhering to the Archon documentation standards. The content deeply integrates the 'Contract/Workflow/Governance' triumvirate, the L2/L3 dual-track gating Mermaid charts, and the 17 built-in workflows catalog across both English and Chinese documentation portals. Old unstructured markdown files in the root documentation directories were removed.
